backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing audio post management, user profiles, favorites, statistics, and access control with authorization and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting mobile optimization features including viewport meta tags, touch target sizing, error boundaries, network connectivity checks, and timeout handlers with associated test IDs and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of frontend components describing mobile optimizations, touch targets, lazy loading, error handling, kids mode features, and performance enhancements across the application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining color schemes for UI components including sidebar, charts, and semantic colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with mobile-optimized viewport meta tags, loading screen with spinner, and error screen UI with recovery buttons for handling initialization failures.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component with lazy-loaded routes, error boundary, network status monitoring, onboarding flow, kids mode support, and query client configuration with retry logic.
frontend/src/components/auth/InterestsCh: Checkbox group component for selecting user interests with a two-column grid layout and scrollable container for overflow handling.
frontend/src/components/categories/Categ: Renders a horizontal list of category filter chips using the CATEGORIES constant, allowing users to select a category which updates the feed filter state.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Dashbo: Displays an empty state hero card for the dashboard with a welcome message, upload CTA button, and a simple profile completion progress indicator showing account creation, profile setup, and first upload steps.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Favori: Displays a grid of favorited audio posts in a card, with optional kids mode filtering. Converts backend AudioPost objects to MockAudioItem format for rendering with AudioCard components.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/MyCont: Displays a grid of the user's uploaded audio content in a card, with optional kids mode filtering. Converts backend AudioPost objects to MockAudioItem format for rendering with AudioCard components.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Statis: Displays two statistic cards showing total uploads and total listens with formatted numbers and icons. Filters statistics by kid-friendly content when kids mode is enabled.
frontend/src/components/feed/AudioCard.t: Renders an audio post card with procedural cover art, play/pause controls, delete button (for own posts), favorite toggle, reply button, and an embedded AudioRepliesSection. Handles playback, deletion, favoriting, and reply dialog interactions with touch feedback.
frontend/src/components/feed/AudioReplie: Displays a collapsible section showing audio replies to a post, with kids mode filtering. Converts backend AudioPost replies to MockAudioItem format and renders them as nested AudioCard components.
frontend/src/components/feed/AudioReplyD: A dialog form for creating audio replies to posts, featuring title/description inputs, audio source selector with duration validation, upload progress tracking, and kids mode support. Submits replies to the backend with replyTo reference and kidFriendly flag.
frontend/src/components/feed/CommentsPan: Displays a list of comments with avatars, author names, timestamps, and content. Shows a placeholder message when no comments exist.
frontend/src/components/feed/ProceduralC: Renders cover images for feed items, falling back to procedurally generated covers when thumbnails are missing or placeholders.
frontend/src/components/language/Languag: Multi-select dropdown for choosing languages with search filtering and custom language addition support. Displays selected count and language labels.
frontend/src/components/layout/BrandingB: Displays a centered header banner image with fallback text and includes a dropdown menu in the top-left corner.
Dropdown menu with navigation links to About, Categories, Contact, Help/FAQ, Terms, and Privacy pages.
frontend/src/components/layout/ErrorBoun: React error boundary component that catches errors, displays error details, and provides reload and clear cache options.
frontend/src/components/layout/FloatingB: Floating action button in the top-right that navigates back to the feed, hidden when the mini-player is active.
frontend/src/components/layout/FloatingL: Floating button with popover for filtering feed by language, supporting search, custom language addition, and multi-select with badge count.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Main application header with logo, slogan, search bar, navigation, and authentication controls (login/logout/dashboard).
frontend/src/components/layout/NetworkSt: Fixed banner at the top that displays network connection status with retry button when offline and auto-hides when connection is restored.
frontend/src/components/layout/PrimaryNa: Primary navigation component with Feed, Explore, Upload, and Kids Mode buttons. Uses TanStack Router for navigation and touch feedback hooks for mobile interactions.
frontend/src/components/layout/RouteLoad: Loading skeleton component displayed during route transitions. Shows placeholder skeletons for page header and a grid of 8 content cards.
frontend/src/components/onboarding/Onboa: Multi-step onboarding wizard with three steps (Discover, Share, Listen) featuring animated icons, progress bar, and navigation controls. Includes skip and complete callbacks.
frontend/src/components/player/MiniPlaye: Fixed bottom mini-player bar showing current audio with play/pause, volume controls, progress slider, and procedural cover art. Includes responsive layout and touch feedback.
frontend/src/components/search/SearchBar: Search input component with debounced query updates (300ms) and auto-language selection on focus. Integrates with feed filters state management.
frontend/src/components/upload/AudioSour: Tabbed component for selecting audio source via file upload or browser recording. Handles MediaRecorder API with format detection, duration limits, cleanup, and preview playback.
frontend/src/components/upload/CategoryP: Popover-based category selector with search, predefined categories, and custom category creation. Uses Command component for searchable dropdown interface.
frontend/src/components/upload/UploadFor: Complete audio upload form with title, description, category, language selection, kid-friendly toggle, and audio source selector. Handles file validation, upload progress, and backend submission with authentication checks.
frontend/src/components/upload/useAudioD: Custom React hook that validates audio file duration against a configurable maximum (default 3 hours), using the HTML5 Audio API to read metadata and returning formatted error messages.
frontend/src/constants/categories.ts: Defines a constant array of content categories (All, Entertainment, Technology, Food, Sports, Politics, Music, Work) and exports a TypeScript type for type-safe category usage.
frontend/src/constants/categoryColors.ts: Maps categories to Tailwind CSS gradient and badge color classes for consistent theming, providing helper functions to retrieve color classes by category name.
frontend/src/constants/interests.ts: Combines base categories with additional interests (Art & Design, Business, Comedy, etc.) to create a comprehensive list of user interests for the platform.
frontend/src/constants/languages.ts: Defines a Language interface and exports a comprehensive list of ISO 639-1 language codes with labels, including a 'none' option for music content.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor based on Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAudioReplies.ts: React Query hook that fetches audio post replies for a given post ID from the user's content, with 30-second timeout and retry logic.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomLanguages.ts: Custom hook for managing user-defined languages stored in localStorage, combining them with built-in languages, preventing duplicates, and providing sorted alphabetical lists.
frontend/src/hooks/useDebounce.ts: Generic React hook that debounces a value by delaying updates until a specified delay (default 300ms) has passed without changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useFavorites.ts: React Query hook that fetches the authenticated user's favorite audio posts with timeout and retry logic, only enabled when user is authenticated.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useKidFriendlyContent: React Query hook that fetches kid-friendly audio posts from the backend with 30-second timeout and retry logic.
frontend/src/hooks/useMyContent.ts: React Query hook that fetches user's audio content and provides mutations for editing and deleting posts, with automatic cache invalidation and timeout handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useOnboarding.ts: Custom hook that manages onboarding completion state using localStorage, providing methods to mark complete, reset, and check completion status.
frontend/src/hooks/usePerformanceMonitor: Hook that logs performance metrics (load time, DOM ready time, render time, memory usage, and viewport size) to the console on component mount.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query mutations for audio post operations (add, listen, remove, favorites, replies) with 30-second timeouts, error handling, and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useTouchFeedback.ts: Custom hook that manages touch interaction state and provides touch event handlers with optional preventDefault for mobile touch feedback.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserStatistics.ts: React Query hook that fetches user statistics from the actor with 30-second timeout, retry logic, and dependency on actor availability.
frontend/src/index.css: Global styles defining CSS variables for light/dark/kids themes using OKLCH color space, plus utility classes for touch targets, feedback, and card elevation.
frontend/src/lib/draftFeedItems.ts: Manages draft audio items in localStorage, converting Files to data URLs for storage and providing CRUD operations with change notification subscriptions.
frontend/src/lib/formatters.ts: Utility functions for formatting numbers with K/M/B suffixes and converting seconds to MM:SS duration format.
frontend/src/lib/proceduralCovers.ts: Generates deterministic SVG cover images based on category and seed using seeded random numbers, category-specific color schemes, and waveform patterns.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility function that combines clsx and tailwind-merge for conditional CSS class name merging.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/mock/mockAudio.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for audio items and comments, plus exports mock audio data for development/testing.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Simple About page component displaying SPEAKR platform information with placeholder content and styling.
frontend/src/pages/AuthPage.tsx: Authentication page with tabbed login and registration forms, including email/password inputs and an interests selection component for new users.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Placeholder contact page displaying a 'coming soon' message for future contact channels.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: User dashboard page requiring authentication that displays statistics, favorites, and user content sections, or an empty state hero when no content exists.
frontend/src/pages/ExplorePage.tsx: Category exploration page displaying a grid of audio content categories with cover images and item counts, supporting both regular and kids mode filtering.
frontend/src/pages/FeedPage.tsx: Main feed page that displays filtered audio items from mock data, draft items, and backend content, with support for search, category filtering, language filtering, and kids mode.
frontend/src/pages/HelpPage.tsx: Placeholder help and FAQ page displaying a 'coming soon' message for future documentation.
frontend/src/pages/OnboardingPage.tsx: Onboarding wizard page that guides new users through initial setup and redirects to home upon completion or skip.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPage.tsx: Placeholder privacy policy page displaying a 'coming soon' message for future legal content.
frontend/src/pages/TermsPage.tsx: Placeholder terms of service page displaying a 'coming soon' message for future legal content.
frontend/src/pages/UploadPage.tsx: Audio upload page containing a form component for users to share audio content.
frontend/src/player/PlayerProvider.tsx: React context provider managing global audio player state including playback controls, progress tracking, volume, and HTML5 audio element lifecycle.
frontend/src/state/feedFilters.ts: Zustand store managing feed filter state (search query, category, languages) with localStorage persistence and auto-selection of browser default language on first load.
frontend/src/state/kidsMode.ts: Zustand store managing kids mode toggle state with sessionStorage persistence to control content filtering across the application.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence and cleanup capabilities.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color system using OKLCH, typography, container settings, shadows, and responsive design tokens.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking architectural decisions, features, and known issues including a critical mobile loading bug in version 44 preventing site access.
